mapper.insert: INSERT INTO supplier_visit_record ( supplier_number, visit_time, visitor, visit_content, attachment, created_by, created_at ) VALUES ( #{supplierNumber}, #{visitTime}, #{visitor}, #{visitContent}, #{attachment}, #{createdBy}, NOW() )
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM supplier_visit_record WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, supplier_number, visit_time, visitor, visit_content, attachment, created_by, created_at FROM supplier_visit_record WHERE supplier_number = #{supplierNumber}

SELECT id, supplier_number, visit_time, visitor, visit_content, attachment,u.nick_name as created_by, created_at FROM supplier_visit_record sv LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON sv.created_by = u.staff_id WHERE supplier_number = #{supplierNumber}
SELECT id, supplier_number, visit_time, visitor, visit_content, attachment, created_by, created_at FROM supplier_visit_record WHERE supplier_number = #{supplierId} AND visit_time = #{visitTime}
